name: Nortec Minerals Corp.
description: Nortec Minerals Corp. is a junior mining exploration company based in Vancouver, British Columbia. The company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties, targeting global projects across numerous commodities at the pre-discovery to pre-development stages. Their portfolio includes projects in Canada, Ecuador, and Finland, where they explore for gold, zinc, copper, lead, silver, and lithium deposits. Nortec is committed to implementing ethical business practices and strives to advance project and shareholder value while maintaining a social and ecological conscience in their operations.
